name: pi-copy-last-response-extension
description: pi extension to copy the last assistant response
readme:
# pi-copy-last-response-extension

[pi](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono) extension that lets you copy the latest assistant response.

## Install

```bash
pi install npm:pi-copy-last-response-extension
```

Or copy locally:

```bash
cp ./copy-last-response.ts ~/.pi/agent/extensions/copy-last-response.ts
```

Then run `/reload` in pi.

## Features

- `Alt+C`: copy last assistant response to clipboard
- `/copy-response`

## Development

```bash
npm run dev:sandbox
```

Runs pi in an isolated sandbox and loads only this extension.
